steps.title: Find the real subject
steps.content: The subject is "collection," which is singular. The phrase "of oil paintings" and the nonessential clause listing paintings add detail but do not change the number of the subject.

steps.title: Match singular agreement
steps.content: A, B, and D use plural verb forms that would agree with "paintings" but not with the actual subject, "collection." The singular verb "remains" correctly agrees with that subject. The answer is C.
